prompt_text: A dying young Chinese noblewoman, Gao Lingning, with pale skin, sharp almond eyes, straight dark brows, black hair in a neat low bun with jade hairpin, cold restrained expression, faint scar on her neck, slim but resilient figure, muted white and dark teal silk robes, aristocratic yet wounded aura, lies on a bed at the right rear of the frame with only her pale face and the contour of the quilt visible; beside the bed stands Shen Ci, a tall aristocratic young man from ancient China, cold and elegant, sharp long eyes, pale skin, high nose bridge, thin lips, black hair in a neat topknot with jade crown, wearing dark blue and black embroidered hanfu, restrained noble aura, subtle obsession and sorrow in his expression, standing rigidly at the left of the bed like a vertical line of pressure, both trapped in a suffocating final memory. Foreground left shows blurred candle flame and half-dropped bed curtains partially obscuring the view, the background is dark aged wooden walls and heavy shadow, with a large black empty area near the bed foot suggesting life being swallowed. Low-saturation warm-cool contrast, dim amber candlelight against gray-blue darkness, side backlight, enclosed feudal bedroom, oppressive negative space, memory flashback mood, cinematic realism, highly detailed historical drama still, subtle film grain.
